description_long: This coupe car features a compact, streamlined body with a deep burgundy exterior and a gently sloping roofline. The windows are tinted and the roof is solid, with a subtle curvature that flows smoothly into the rear. The car has two doors, each with a visible handle, and sits on four small, dark wheels. The front end is rounded with a low profile, while the rear is slightly raised, giving the car a sporty stance. Chrome or metallic trim is visible around the windows and possibly on the wheels, and the overall design suggests a modern, urban-friendly coupe.
description: A compact, burgundy coupe car with a sleek, curved roofline, two doors, and dark wheels, designed for urban environments.
description_view_0: Rear three-quarter view showing the sloped back, rear window, and part of the left side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two-door configuration, side windows, and overall length.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the rounded nose, windshield, and both headlights.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the door, side window, and rear wheel.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
